member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController
member.summary: APIs for quantity measurement operations such as add, subtract, compare, divide, convert, and history.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.Add(QuantityMeasurementAppModel.DTOs.AddRequestDto)
member.param: Input values, units, and quantity type.
member.returns: Returns the sum of the two quantities.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.Subtract(QuantityMeasurementAppModel.DTOs.AddRequestDto)
member.param: Input values, units, and quantity type.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.Compare(QuantityMeasurementAppModel.DTOs.CompareRequestDto)
member.param: Input values, units, and quantity type.
member.returns: Returns which quantity is greater or if both are equal.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.Divide(QuantityMeasurementAppModel.DTOs.AddRequestDto)
member.param: Input values, units, and quantity type.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.Convert(QuantityMeasurementAppModel.DTOs.ConvertRequestDto)
member.summary: Convert a quantity from one unit to another.
member.param: Input value, source unit, target unit, and quantity type.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.GetHistory
member.summary: Get complete history of measurement operations.
member.returns: Returns all stored quantity measurement records.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.GetCount
member.summary: Get total count of stored operations.
member.returns: Returns total number of saved operations.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.GetOperationType
member.returns: Returns the list of supported operation types.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementAppAPI.Controllers.QuantityController.GetMeasurementType
member.returns: Returns the list of supported measurement categories.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
